data.name: kirha
data.description: Primary Kirha Search API summarization model, optimized for high-quality, context-aware responses. Supports unified language endpoints through Kirha Search auto mode, explicit plan creation, and stateless plan execution reuse.

data.name: kirha-flash
data.description: Faster Kirha Search API summarization model for low-latency and high-throughput use cases. Supports unified language endpoints through Kirha Search auto mode, explicit plan creation, and stateless plan execution reuse.

data.name: Kirha Insurance Search
data.description: Kirha Search shortcut for the insurance vertical. Automatically sends vertical_id=insurance while preserving metadata overrides for all other Search API options.

data.name: Kirha News Search
data.description: Kirha Search shortcut for the news vertical. Automatically sends vertical_id=news while preserving metadata overrides for all other Search API options.

data.name: Kirha Dev Search
data.description: Kirha Search shortcut for the dev vertical. Automatically sends vertical_id=dev while preserving metadata overrides for all other Search API options.

data.name: Kirha Adtech Search
data.description: Kirha Search shortcut for the adtech vertical. Automatically sends vertical_id=adtech while preserving metadata overrides for all other Search API options.

data.name: Kirha Crypto Search
data.description: Kirha Search shortcut for the crypto vertical. Automatically sends vertical_id=crypto while preserving metadata overrides for all other Search API options.

data.name: Kirha Medical Search
data.description: Kirha Search shortcut for the medical vertical. Automatically sends vertical_id=medical while preserving metadata overrides for all other Search API options.

data.name: Kirha Company Search
data.description: Kirha Search shortcut for the company vertical. Automatically sends vertical_id=company while preserving metadata overrides for all other Search API options.

data.name: kirha-tasks
data.description: Kirha Tasks API model for asynchronous multi-vertical research tasks with multi-agent validation, automatic retries, task polling, and provider-executed task progress events in unified streaming.
